story: A little sister sends Rebecca a note begging for Maliboo Barbie back. Barbie is her BEST friend, the only doll that fits the Jeep, and she is needed for Candy Mountain, Soda Pop Lake, Bubblebath Waterfall, and Catch the Leaves. She offers to share her pink bike, smelly markers, and Cup of Gold, and begs Rebecca not to make her tell Mom, who is tired of fixing their fights and might take the doll away. In her room, Rebecca has decided she will give Maliboo Barbie back after twenty minutes of playing with Ken.
implausible_knowledge: In her room, Rebecca has decided she will give Maliboo Barbie back after twenty minutes of playing with Ken.
question: What is the little sister most likely to do next?
answer_without_knowledge: Write another note demanding Maliboo Barbie back now.
